name: openclaw-agent-webui
description: OpenClaw Agent WebUI - A modern web interface for OpenClaw

scripts.dev: export BACKEND_PORT=8898 FRONTEND_PORT=8899 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui_dev && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.release: export BACKEND_PORT=8898 FRONTEND_PORT=8899 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui && npm run build && concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && PORT=8898 CLAWUI_DATA_DIR=.clawui npm start
